verbs.name: facet-enrich
verbs.summary: Extend an existing FacetRecord with additional evidence (new aliases, locator-strategy observations, refined predicates). Does not rewrite the stable ID.

inputs.summary: A proposal envelope carrying the facet ID and the evidence to append.

outputs.summary: The record reflecting the applied enrichment (on-read derivation; evidence log is source of truth).

verbs.name: facet-mint
verbs.summary: Mint a new FacetRecord with atomic-at-mint provenance and a stable ID. Fails when an existing facet at the same stable ID is already present.

inputs.summary: The facet payload plus a MintingInstrument tag and run context.

outputs.summary: The newly minted record with provenance header.

verbs.name: facet-query
verbs.summary: Resolve one or more FacetRecords by stable ID, by intent phrase, or by kind-scoped predicate.

outputs.summary: Zero or more matching FacetRecords with per-match evidence counts.

verbs.name: intent-fetch
verbs.summary: Fetch a single work item from the configured intent source (ADO REST, testbed, or a file) and return its raw payload plus revision metadata.

inputs.summary: The work-item address (`{ source: "ado" | "testbed" | "probe"; id: string }`).

outputs.summary: The fetched work item wrapped with source-text provenance and revision.

verbs.name: interact
verbs.summary: Dispatch a single action (click, input, select, wait) at a facet-referenced locator and return the outcome envelope.

inputs.summary: The action kind + affordance + locator descriptor.

outputs.summary: The outcome envelope carrying success/failure classification and observed post-state.

verbs.name: locator-health-track
verbs.summary: Record a locator-strategy attempt against an element facet, updating the co-located per-strategy health aggregate.

inputs.summary: The facet ID, the strategy kind, and the attempt outcome.

outputs.summary: The updated health aggregate for the named strategy.

verbs.name: observe
verbs.summary: Capture an accessibility-tree snapshot of the current page and return it as a structured ARIA node.

inputs.summary: The page handle plus an optional observation scope (element / region).

outputs.summary: The ARIA snapshot with timestamp and source fingerprint.

verbs.name: test-compose
verbs.summary: Emit a QA-legible Playwright test from a grounded flow spec, referencing facets by name (not selectors).

inputs.summary: The grounded flow whose steps have resolved to facet references and programs.

outputs.summary: The emitted spec file path, the AST digest, and the referenced-facet index.
